deltas.title: Install at least one linter sensor in sandbox
deltas.change: Add ESLint (js) or Pylint (py) containerized sensor
deltas.why: Enable non-empty lint rows during analysis-only execution

deltas.title: Auto-wire MBML into boot preflight
deltas.change: Invoke MBML preflight when artifacts detected

deltas.title: Persist Quality Episodes registry
deltas.change: Write quality episodes to durable registry
deltas.why: Improve suppression accuracy and regression gates
